news.title:
Bank of Maharashtra disclosed NCD details as of Mar '26.
Timely FY '25-'26 interest payments confirmed; AA ratings reaffirmed.
news.summary:
Bank of Maharashtra disclosed NCD details as of Mar '26.
Timely FY '25-'26 interest payments confirmed; AA ratings reaffirmed.

news.title:
PSU Bank index gains 4.5% as bond yields cool off; Union Bank, Bank of Maharashtra lead with 5% surge.
SBI, PNB, Canara Bank among others rise 4-5%; India's 10-year bond yield drops 15bps to 6.9%.
news.summary:
PSU Bank index gains 4.5% as bond yields cool off; Union Bank, Bank of Maharashtra lead with 5% surge.
SBI, PNB, Canara Bank among others rise 4-5%; India's 10-year bond yield drops 15bps to 6.9%.

news.title:
Bank of Maharashtra signals bullish momentum shift via technical indicators.
Renewed investor interest driven by moving averages and Bollinger Bands.
news.summary:
Bank of Maharashtra signals bullish momentum shift via technical indicators.
Renewed investor interest driven by moving averages and Bollinger Bands.

news.title:
SBI Securities sees strong Q4 for banks, favoring HDFC Bank, BoB, BoM, and Indian Bank.
IT sector shows limited downside; AI-driven opportunities ahead with caution on oil marketers.
news.summary:
SBI Securities sees strong Q4 for banks, favoring HDFC Bank, BoB, BoM, and Indian Bank.
IT sector shows limited downside; AI-driven opportunities ahead with caution on oil marketers.

news.title:
Bank stocks mixed; PSU banks like BoB & BoM rose sharply, private banks like IndusInd & HDFC fell.
RBL Bank showed exceptional growth in advances & deposits; IDFC First Bank faced CASA ratio decline.
news.summary:
Bank stocks mixed; PSU banks like BoB & BoM rose sharply, private banks like IndusInd & HDFC fell.
RBL Bank showed exceptional growth in advances & deposits; IDFC First Bank faced CASA ratio decline.

news.title:
Bank of Maharashtra reports 14% growth in total deposits by March end.
Gross advances of Bank of Maharashtra rise 22% in the same period.
news.summary:
Bank of Maharashtra reports 14% growth in total deposits by March end.
Gross advances of Bank of Maharashtra rise 22% in the same period.

news.title:
Bank of Maharashtra Q4 credit rose 22% to ₹2.92 lakh crore.
Total business grew to ₹6.42 lakh crore in Q4 FY26.
news.summary:
Bank of Maharashtra Q4 credit rose 22% to ₹2.92 lakh crore.
Total business grew to ₹6.42 lakh crore in Q4 FY26.

news.title:
President of India holds 73.6% in Bank of Maharashtra as of 31 Mar 2026.
No new encumbrance by promoter group in FY25-26; SEBI SAST compliance disclosed.
news.summary:
President of India holds 73.6% in Bank of Maharashtra as of 31 Mar 2026.
No new encumbrance by promoter group in FY25-26; SEBI SAST compliance disclosed.

news.title:
Bank of Maharashtra revises MCLR; overnight rate cut to 7.75%, effective 31.03.2026.
Rates for other tenors remain unchanged; one-month to one-year rates stay at 8.20%-8.85%.
news.summary:
Bank of Maharashtra revises MCLR; overnight rate cut to 7.75%, effective 31.03.2026.
Rates for other tenors remain unchanged; one-month to one-year rates stay at 8.20%-8.85%.

news.title:
Bank of Maharashtra's EGM approved appointment of Shri Prabhat Kiran as Executive Director.
Shri Prasenjeet Fadnavis was elected as Shareholder Director, effective 24th March 2026.
news.summary:
Bank of Maharashtra's EGM approved appointment of Shri Prabhat Kiran as Executive Director.
Shri Prasenjeet Fadnavis was elected as Shareholder Director, effective 24th March 2026.

news.title:
FPIs increased stakes in 13 midcap stocks like AWL, Bank of Maharashtra, Hitachi Energy steadily over four quarters.
Notable large caps Bharti Airtel, TVS Motor, and small caps Indegene, Authum saw significant FPI inflows amid cautious market sentiment.
news.summary:
FPIs increased stakes in 13 midcap stocks like AWL, Bank of Maharashtra, Hitachi Energy steadily over four quarters.
Notable large caps Bharti Airtel, TVS Motor, and small caps Indegene, Authum saw significant FPI inflows amid cautious market sentiment.

news.title:
Bank of Maharashtra's securities reaffirmed with IVR AA Stable ratings by Infomerics on 11.03.2026.
Ratings cover Basel III Tier II Bonds and AT I Bonds, totaling Rs. 3,000 crore.
news.summary:
Bank of Maharashtra's securities reaffirmed with IVR AA Stable ratings by Infomerics on 11.03.2026.
Ratings cover Basel III Tier II Bonds and AT I Bonds, totaling Rs. 3,000 crore.

news.title:
Fitch affirms Bank of Maharashtra's IDR at 'BBB-' with Stable Outlook; upgrades Viability Rating to 'bb'.
Improved operating environment and risk profile drive BOM's financial performance; asset quality and profitability outlooks remain positive.
news.summary:
Fitch affirms Bank of Maharashtra's IDR at 'BBB-' with Stable Outlook; upgrades Viability Rating to 'bb'.
Improved operating environment and risk profile drive BOM's financial performance; asset quality and profitability outlooks remain positive.

news.title: IDBI Capital issues a Buy rating for Bank of Maharashtra at CMP ₹71.84 (24 Feb 26, 16:00).
news.summary: IDBI Capital issues a Buy rating for Bank of Maharashtra at CMP ₹71.84 (24 Feb 26, 16:00).

news.title:
Bank of Maharashtra hits a 52-week high of Rs 72.3 on Feb 24, 2026.
Exceptional volume and strong accumulation make it a key mid-cap banking opportunity.
news.summary:
Bank of Maharashtra hits a 52-week high of Rs 72.3 on Feb 24, 2026.
Exceptional volume and strong accumulation make it a key mid-cap banking opportunity.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
Foreign investors increase stakes in PSU banks despite $19B outflows in 2025, attracted by low valuations and rising profits.
Banks like Bank of Maharashtra, Union Bank, and Canara Bank hit FPI ownership highs, with PSU Bank index rallying 60% over the year.
news.summary:
Foreign investors increase stakes in PSU banks despite $19B outflows in 2025, attracted by low valuations and rising profits.
Banks like Bank of Maharashtra, Union Bank, and Canara Bank hit FPI ownership highs, with PSU Bank index rallying 60% over the year.

news.title:
RBI fined Bank of Maharashtra Rs 32.5 lakh for credit info, KYC non-compliance.
Issues found in March 31, 2025 inspection; bank improving internal controls.
news.summary:
RBI fined Bank of Maharashtra Rs 32.5 lakh for credit info, KYC non-compliance.
Issues found in March 31, 2025 inspection; bank improving internal controls.

news.title:
Bank of Maharashtra paid Rs.16.4 crore annual interest on BASEL III Tier II Bonds (ISIN INE457A08076) on 11.02.2026.
The bond issue size is Rs.205 crore, with a record date of 27th Jan 2026 for interest payment.
news.summary:
Bank of Maharashtra paid Rs.16.4 crore annual interest on BASEL III Tier II Bonds (ISIN INE457A08076) on 11.02.2026.
The bond issue size is Rs.205 crore, with a record date of 27th Jan 2026 for interest payment.

news.title:
Bank of Maharashtra nears a 13-year breakout, forming a Cup & Handle pattern with bullish RSI and MACD signals.
FIIs & DIIs increased stakes; bank posts record profit, lower NPAs, and strong retail loan growth, with ROA & ROE above guidance.
news.summary:
Bank of Maharashtra nears a 13-year breakout, forming a Cup & Handle pattern with bullish RSI and MACD signals.
FIIs & DIIs increased stakes; bank posts record profit, lower NPAs, and strong retail loan growth, with ROA & ROE above guidance.
